title: Fix font colors to white on Review, Filter, and Contact pages

requirements.text: On the Reviews page (and the CustomerReviews component used on Home), change all text elements — including review body text, reviewer names, star ratings, date labels, and any headings — to white or a light-contrast color (e.g., white or off-white) so they are fully legible against the dark background.

quotes: Change the colour of the font in review page

acceptanceCriteria: All text in the Reviews/CustomerReviews section is white or off-white and clearly readable against the background.
Reviewer names, review body text, star rating labels, and pagination controls all have sufficient contrast.
No dark-on-dark or invisible text remains in the reviews area.

requirements.text: On the Menu page filter/tab section (MenuTabs component and any search/filter controls on the Menu page), change all filter tab labels, search input text, placeholder text, and category button text to white or a legible light color so they are visible against the dark or colored backgrounds.

quotes: Change the colour of the font in review page , filter

acceptanceCriteria: All tab labels in MenuTabs are white and readable against their backgrounds.
Active and inactive tab states both have legible white or light-colored text.
Search bar placeholder and typed text are white or off-white.
No filter-related text is invisible or hard to read.

requirements.text: On the Contact page (frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx), change all text elements — including section headings, labels, address/phone/email info, business hours, form field labels, input placeholder text, and button text — to white or a light-contrast color wherever text appears against a dark or colored background.

quotes: Change the colour of the font in review page , filter , contact page likewise change the colour of the font to white where it is needed

acceptanceCriteria: All headings and body text on the Contact page are white or off-white and clearly readable.
Form labels, input placeholder text, and helper text are legible white on their backgrounds.
Contact info items (address, phone, email, hours) display in white with sufficient contrast.
Button text and icon labels on the Contact page are readable.
No text on the Contact page is invisible or unreadably dark.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/.
Do not change layout, spacing, or non-text visual elements — only fix text/font colors.
Preserve the existing dark/restaurant theme; only update text colors to white or off-white where contrast is insufficient.
nonGoals: Changing background colors, images, or overall theme.
Updating text colors on pages other than Reviews, Filter/Menu, and Contact.
